settings.label: iSize W
settings.description: Changes the resolution.

settings.label: bFull Screen
settings.description: Sets the display mode.

settings.label: bUseTAA
settings.description: Specifies the antialiasing (AA) applied to edges to make them smoother and less jagged.

settings.label: fDefaultWorldFOV
settings.description: Sets the default world field of view.

settings.label: fDefaultFOV
settings.description: Sets the default field of view.

settings.label: fDefault1stPersonFOV
settings.description: Sets the default 1st person field of view.

settings.label: bAlwaysActive
settings.description: Toggles the ability of the game to remain active when it is out of focus (i.e. if in a windowed mode setup, if one clicks outside the game window with this enabled, the game will not pause).

settings.label: bUse64bitsHDRRenderTarget
settings.description: Toggles 64-bit render targets. Disabling this can cause a significant performance boost with very little visual difference. Basically it is a more precise method of rendering that reduces banding artifacts.

settings.label: iVSyncPresentInterval
settings.description: Toggles vertical synchronization (VSync), which removes screen tearing.

settings.label: bLockFramerate
settings.description: Toggles the ability for the game to lock the frame rate to 60 frames per second.

settings.label: fMaxTime
settings.description: Sets the maximum framerate supported by game physics.

settings.label: fGamma
settings.description: Sets the gamma (brightness/darkness).

settings.label: fGlobalBrightnessBoost
settings.description: Sets the global brightness boost modifier

settings.label: fGlobalContrastBoost
settings.description: Sets the global contrast boost modifier

settings.label: fGlobalSaturationBoost
settings.description: Sets the global saturation boost modifier

settings.label: fGlobalBloomThresholdBoost
settings.description: Sets the global bloom threshold boost modifier

settings.label: sLanguage
settings.description: Sets the language used for text elements.

settings.label: bFreebiesSeen
settings.description: Toggles the pop-up to download the Creation Club Content.

settings.label: sIntroSequence
settings.description: Toggles the game intro logos.

settings.label: sMainMenuMusic
settings.description: Toggles the game intro music.

settings.label: bShowMarkers
settings.description: Toggles markers useful for modders. Do NOT use for actual gameplay'

settings.label: uMaxSizeForCachedSound
settings.description: Sets the maximum size for cached sound.

settings.label: bDisableAutoSave
settings.description: Toggles autosaves.

settings.label: iAutoSaveCount
settings.description: Sets the maximum number of autosaves to keep.

settings.label: bSaveOnPause
settings.description: Toggles autosaves made upon closing certain menus that pause the game.

settings.label: fAutosaveEveryXMins
settings.description: Sets the timer to make a new autosave upon closing certain menus that pause the game.

settings.label: bSaveOnTravel
settings.description: Toggles autosaves made after traveling to different locations.

settings.label: bSaveOnRest
settings.description: Toggles autosaves made after sleeping.

settings.label: bSaveOnWait
settings.description: Toggles autosaves made after waiting.

settings.label: bDisplayMissingContentDialogue
settings.description: Toggles the missing content warning when loading a saved game missing a previously enabled plugin.

settings.label: bAllowScriptedAutosave
settings.description: Toggles scripted autosaves.

settings.label: bAllowScriptedForceSave
settings.description: Toggles scripted force saves.

settings.label: uiCompression
settings.description: Sets the type of compression used on the save game file.

settings.label: fPostLoadUpdateTimeMS
settings.description: Sets time, in milliseconds, given to scripts to update after loading.

settings.label: iMaxAllocatedMemoryBytes
settings.description: Sets the maximum memory that Papyrus can hold at a time.

settings.label: bEnableLogging
settings.description: Toggles Papyrus logs being written to disk.

settings.label: bLoadDebugInformation
settings.description: Toggles additional debug information. If enabled, line number information will be available in error traces at the expense of higher memory usage.

settings.label: bEnableProfiling
settings.description: Toggles script profiling, which enables profiling commands and allows profiling information to be logged, at the cost of some script performance.

settings.label: bEnableTrace
settings.description: Toggles script tracing.

settings.label: sScreenShotBaseName
settings.description: Sets the location of game screenshots.

settings.label: iScreenShotIndex
settings.description: Sets the screenshot index number.

settings.label: iDifficulty
settings.description: Sets the difficulty level.

settings.label: bAlwaysDriveRagdoll
settings.description: Toggles always drive ragdoll. This makes ragdolls more animated when bumped.

settings.label: bAlwaysRunByDefault
settings.description: Toggles the ability of the character to always run by default. If turned off, you can still run, but walking is the default action.

settings.label: bDisableCombatDialogue
settings.description: Toggles those cheeky comments that enemies say while in combat.

settings.label: bEnableHavokHit
settings.description: Toggles hit recoil. Actors respond to being punched.

settings.label: bForceNPCsUseAmmo
settings.description: Toggles off unlimited NPC ammo. If enabled, NPCs will no longer have access to unlimited ammo, but shall be forced to only use the ammo they possess.

settings.label: bVATSDisable
settings.description: Deactivates cinematic killmove camera. Kill moves will still work.

settings.label: bBorderRegionsEnabled
settings.description: Toggles off the borders at the edges of the map.

settings.label: bShowTutorials
settings.description: Toggles the in-game tutorial pop-ups.

settings.label: f1PArrowTiltUpAngle
settings.description: Sets the upward tilt angle of arrows in 1st-person view.

settings.label: f3PArrowTiltUpAngle
settings.description: Sets the upward tilt angle of arrows in 3rd-person view.

settings.label: f1PBoltTiltUpAngle
settings.description: Sets the upward tilt angle of crossbow bolts in 1st-person view.

settings.label: fVisibleNavmeshMoveDist
settings.description: Sets the maximum distance that arrows can hit actors.

settings.label: fHavokHitImpulseMult
settings.description: Sets the hit recoil multiplier.

settings.label: fWeaponChangeClearTime
settings.description: Sets the weapon change clear time.

settings.label: fEncumberedReminderTimer
settings.description: Sets the time interval between subsequent "You are carrying too much to be able to run" messages in seconds.

settings.label: fLandFriction
settings.description: Sets the landscape friction.

settings.label: fBookOpenTime
settings.description: Sets the time in milliseconds it takes to open books. 50 appears to be the minimum amount for you to still be able to read the book, but might vary.

settings.label: iHorseTransitionMillis
settings.description: Sets the time in milliseconds it takes for the camera to readjust after dismounting a horse.

settings.label: iSubtitleSpeakerNameColor
settings.description: Sets the subtitle text color of the name of the person speaking.

settings.label: bDialogueSubtitles
settings.description: Toggles subtitles for NPCs who are directly talking to you.

settings.label: bGeneralSubtitles
settings.description: Toggles subtitles for NPCs who are not directly talking to you.

settings.label: bEnablePlatform
settings.description: Toggles Bethesda's built-in modding platform. If disabled, Creation Club news will no longer appear, but the "Mods" and "Creation Club" buttons will still be active, albeit probably broken.

settings.label: bModManagerMenuEnabled
settings.description: Toggles the "Mods" menu item in the in-game system menu.

settings.label: bGamePadRumble
settings.description: Toggles controller vibration.

settings.label: uMaxCustomItemNameLength
settings.description: Sets the maximum number of characters that can be used for custom names of items renamed during enchanting.

settings.label: bCrosshairEnabled
settings.description: Toggles the crosshair.

settings.label: bShowCompass
settings.description: Toggles the compass.

settings.label: fHUDOpacity
settings.description: Sets HUD opacity.

settings.label: bShowQuestMarkers
settings.description: Toggles quest markers on the map and the compass.

settings.label: bShowFloatingQuestMarkers
settings.description: Toggles floating quest markers on items and characters.

settings.label: iConsoleSizeScreenPercent
settings.description: Sets the percentage of the screen that the in-game console can fill.

settings.label: iConsoleTextSize
settings.description: Sets the size for text in the in-game console.

settings.label: iConsoleHistoryCharBufferSize
settings.description: Sets the console history buffer size.

settings.label: rConsoleTextColor
settings.description: Sets the color of text typed into the console.

settings.label: rConsoleHistoryTextColor
settings.description: Sets the color of the text output in the console.

settings.label: fMapWorldMaxPitch
settings.description: Unlocks the map menu navigation so that when the right mouse button is held, the camera can move more freely.

settings.label: bWorldMapNoSkyDepthBlur
settings.description: Removes blurring effects on the map menu.

settings.label: fGlobalMapBrightnessBoost
settings.description: Sets the global brightness boost modifier for the map.

settings.label: fGlobalMapContrastBoost
settings.description: Sets the global contrast boost modifier for the map.

settings.label: fGlobalMapBloomThresholdBoost
settings.description: Sets the global bloom threshold boost modifier for the map.

settings.label: bInvertYValues
settings.description: Toggles the ability of the the mouse to be inverted over the y-axis (up and down movement).

settings.label: fMouseHeadingSensitivity
settings.description: Sets the look sensitivity (how fast the camera moves in response to the mouse).

settings.label: fMouseCursorSpeed
settings.description: Sets the velocity of the mouse cursor in menus, such as the inventory menu.

settings.label: fMouseHeadingXScale
settings.description: Sets the mouse horizontal scale value (how much the camera moves when moving the mouse horizontally).

settings.label: fMouseHeadingYScale
settings.description: Sets the mouse vertical scale value (how much the camera moves when moving the mouse vertically).

settings.label: fMouseWheelZoomSpeed
settings.description: Sets the transition speed when zooming in and out in third person mode using the mouse wheel. This also affects how fast the transition from first to third person occurs.

settings.label: bEnableProjecteUVDiffuseNormals
settings.description: Toggles the use of projected UV diffuse normals. It is recommended to leave this enabled. Some mods missing the appropriate projecteddiffuse.dds texture can cause this feature to looked bugged.

settings.label: bEnableImprovedSnow
settings.description: Toggles the improved snow shader. Please note that "improved" is subjective in this case. It is recommended to be disabled in most cases.

settings.label: bDeactivateAOOnSnow
settings.description: Toggles ambient occlusion on snow.

settings.label: bEnableSnowMask
settings.description: Toggles the snow mask. This adds an effect to certain landscapes around snow.

settings.label: bToggleSparkles
settings.description: Toggles snow sparkles.

settings.label: bEnableSnowRimLighting
settings.description: Toggles snow rim lighting.

settings.label: fSparklesIntensity
settings.description: Sets the intensity of snow sparkles.

settings.label: fSparklesDensity
settings.description: Sets the density of snow sparkles.

settings.label: fSparklesSize
settings.description: Sets the size of snow sparkles.

settings.label: fSnowRimLightIntensity
settings.description: Sets the intensity of rim lighting.

settings.label: fSnowGeometrySpecPower
settings.description: Sets the power of gloss/rim lighting on snow-covered geometry. Higher values are darker. Lower values are brighter.

settings.label: fSnowNormalSpecPower
settings.description: Sets the power of gloss/rim lighting on snow-covered landscape. Higher values are darker. Lower values are brighter.

settings.label: bEnableGrassFade
settings.description: Toggles the gradual, fade-in effect for grass.

settings.label: bDrawShaderGrass
settings.description: Toggles drawing grass.

settings.label: bAllowCreateGrass
settings.description: Toggles creating grass positions information.

settings.label: bAllowLoadGrass
settings.description:
Toggles loading grass from gid files.

ONLY TURN ON IF YOU KNOW WHAT YOU ARE DOING.

Typically use No Grass In Objects mod for this functionality instead.

settings.label: iMinGrassSize
settings.description: Sets the grass density.

settings.label: iMaxGrassTypesPerTexure
settings.description: Sets the grass diversity.

settings.label: fGrassStartFadeDistance
settings.description: Sets the distance where grass starts to fade.

settings.label: fGrassFadeRange
settings.description: Sets the grass fade range distance.

settings.label: fGrassWindMagnitudeMin
settings.description: Sets the minimum wind magnitude blowing grass.

settings.label: fGrassWindMagnitudeMax
settings.description: Sets the maximum wind magnitude blowing grass.

settings.label: bEnableTreeAnimations
settings.description: Toggles between dynamic and static tree model rendering.

settings.label: fUpdateBudget
settings.description: Toggles off tree animations.

settings.label: bRenderSkinnedTrees
settings.description: Toggles the rendering of enhanced tree detail.

settings.label: uiMaxSkinnedTreesToRender
settings.description: Sets the maximum number of trees to render with enhanced tree detail.

settings.label: fTreesMidLODSwitchDist
settings.description: Sets the distance that trees have full skinned details. The trees switch to the lower quality SwitchNode mesh within the nif after this distance.

settings.label: fMeshLODLevel1FadeTreeDistance
settings.description: Sets the level 1 skinned tree detail fade distance.

settings.label: fMeshLODLevel2FadeTreeDistance
settings.description: Sets the level 2 skinned tree detail fade distance.

settings.label: bReflectLODTrees
settings.description: Toggles tree reflections in the water.

settings.label: bReflectLODLand
settings.description: Toggles land reflections in the water.

settings.label: bReflectLODObjects
settings.description: Toggles object reflections in the water.

settings.label: bReflectSky
settings.description: Toggles the sky reflection in the water.

settings.label: fWaterSSRBlurAmount
settings.description: Sets the amount of blur on screen space reflections in water.

settings.label: fWaterSSRIntensity
settings.description: Sets the intensity of screen space reflections in water.

settings.label: fWaterSSRNormalPerturbationScale
settings.description: Sets the perturbation scale of screen space reflections in water.

settings.label: bTreesReceiveShadows
settings.description: Toggles the ability of trees to cast shadows upon themselves.

settings.label: bDisableHighTreeShadow
settings.description: Toggles high tree shadows.

settings.label: bDrawLandShadows
settings.description: Toggles the ability of land objects such as rocks and mountains to cast shadows.

settings.label: iShadowMapResolution
settings.description: Sets the resolution of shadows.

settings.label: fShadowDirectionalBiasScale
settings.description: Sets the directional bias of the shadows applied to surfaces. Low values reduce peter-panning (detached shadows), but cause more shadow acne (AKA shadow striping).

settings.label: fPoissonRadiusScale
settings.description: Sets the amount of shadow filtering.

settings.label: fFirstSliceDistance
settings.description: Sets the detailed draw distance (the shadows closest to your character).

settings.label: fShadowDistance
settings.description: Sets the exterior shadow distance.

settings.label: iNumFocusShadow
settings.description: Sets the maximum number of objects to use very highly detailed shadows based on where you are looking.

settings.label: fMaxHeightShadowCastingTrees
settings.description: Sets the maximum height that trees can cast high tree shadows.

settings.label: bSAOEnable
settings.description: Toggles ambient occlusion.

settings.label: fSAOBias
settings.description: Sets the SAO bias.

settings.label: fSAOExpFactor
settings.description: Sets the SAO bias.

settings.label: fSAOIntensity
settings.description: Sets the SAO intensity.

settings.label: fSAORadius
settings.description: Sets the SAO radio.

settings.label: fSAOValueDiffFactor
settings.description: Sets the SAO value diff factor.

settings.label: fSunBaseSize
settings.description: Sets sun base size.

settings.label: fSunGlareSize
settings.description: Sets sun base size.

settings.label: fSunBoost
settings.description: Sets the sun boost.

settings.label: fSunGlareMultiplier
settings.description: Sets the sun glare multiplier.

settings.label: bDecals
settings.description: Toggles decals (mostly blood effects).

settings.label: bDisableAllGore
settings.description: Toggles gory effects, such as blood.

settings.label: iMaxDecalsPerFrame
settings.description: Sets the maximum number of decals that can be shown per frame.

settings.label: uMaxSkinDecals
settings.description: Sets the maximum number of skinned decals.

settings.label: iMaxSkinDecalsPerFrame
settings.description: Sets the maximum number of skinned decals that can be shown per frame.

settings.label: uMaxSkinDecalPerActor
settings.description: Sets the maximum number of skinned decals per actor.

settings.label: fDecalLifetime
settings.description: Sets the time in seconds that some decals will stay visible.

settings.label: fDecalLOD0
settings.description: Sets the distance that some decals will show.

settings.label: iMaxDesired
settings.description: Sets the amount of particle effects.

settings.label: bVolumetricLightingEnable
settings.description: Sets Godrays (volumetric lighting) quality.

settings.label: bVolumetricLightingDisableInterior
settings.description: Toggles Godrays in interiors. This may cause interiors to become overly bright in some cases.

settings.label: bLensFlare
settings.description: Toggles lens flare.

settings.label: bIBLFEnable
settings.description: Toggles the horizontal lens flare effect most commonly associated with anamorphic lenses.

settings.label: bUsePrecipitationOcclusion
settings.description: Toggles precipitation occlusion (rain will not appear under roofs).

settings.label: bScreenSpaceReflectionEnabled
settings.description: Toggles screen space reflections.

settings.label: iReflectionResolutionDivider
settings.description: Sets the resolution divider of screen space reflections.

settings.label: bDoDepthOfField
settings.description: Toggles depth of field (DOF), a kind of blurring to imitate the human eye's perception, in imagespace. This is most noticeable under water, reducing visibility to realistic levels (it looks clear otherwise). It is recommended to leave this enabled, as most of the bad depth of field is controlled by the DOF Multiplier below.

settings.label: fDynamicDOFBlurMultiplier
settings.description: Sets the depth of field multiplier.

settings.label: fEnvmapLODFadeStart
settings.description: Sets the distance where the environment map starts to fade.

settings.label: fEnvmapLODFadeEnd
settings.description: Sets the environment map fade end distance.

settings.label: fRefractionLODFadeStart
settings.description: Sets the distance where refraction starts to fade.

settings.label: fRefractionLODFadeEnd
settings.description: Sets the refraction fade end distance.

settings.label: fSpecularLODFadeStart
settings.description: Sets the distance where specularity starts to fade.

settings.label: fSpecularLODFadeEnd
settings.description: Sets the specular fade end distance.

settings.label: fDecalLODFadeStart
settings.description: Sets the distance where decals start to fade.

settings.label: fDecalLODFadeEnd
settings.description: Sets the decal fade end distance.

settings.label: fLightLODStartFade
settings.description: Sets the distance where light starts to fade

settings.label: fLightLODRange
settings.description: Sets the light fade range distance.

settings.label: fMeshLODLevel1FadeDist
settings.description: Sets the level 1 object detail fade distance.

settings.label: fMeshLODLevel2FadeDist
settings.description: Sets the level 2 object detail fade distance.

settings.label: fLODFadeOutMultActors
settings.description: Sets the actor fade distance

settings.label: fLODFadeOutMultItems
settings.description: Sets the item fade distance

settings.label: fLODFadeOutMultObjects
settings.description: Sets the object fade distance

settings.label: fFlickeringLightDistance
settings.description: Sets the flickering light fade distance

settings.label: uGridsToLoad
settings.description: Sets how many grids will be actively rendered and processed around the Player Character (PC).

settings.label: fBlockLevel0Distance
settings.description: Sets the level 4 block distance. This is the distance that level 4 object LOD is shown. Additionally, level 4 terrain LOD is shown at this distance, but multiplied by the Terrain Multiplier (fSplitDistanceMult).

settings.label: fBlockLevel1Distance
settings.description: Sets the level 8 block distance. This is the distance that level 8 object LOD is shown. Additionally, level 8 terrain LOD is shown at this distance, but multiplied by the Terrain Multiplier (fSplitDistanceMult).

settings.label: fBlockMaximumDistance
settings.description: Sets the level 16 block distance. This is the distance that level 16 object LOD is shown. Additionally, level 16 terrain LOD is shown at this distance, but multiplied by the Terrain Multiplier (fSplitDistanceMult).

settings.label: fSplitDistanceMult
settings.description: Sets the terrain multiplier. This value gets multiplied by the block distances to determine the terrain LOD distance.

settings.label: fSkyCellRefFadeDistance
settings.description: Sets the neverfade distance.

settings.label: fTreeLoadDistance
settings.description: Sets the tree LOD distance. Set to 0 if using DynDOLOD Ultra trees in object LOD.

settings.label: bEnableLandFade
settings.description: Toggles terrain LOD fade. Recommended to be disabled to prevent flickering.

settings.label: uLargeRefLODGridSize
settings.description: Sets how many grids full models for large references will show past the uGridsToLoad cells without the need to set the IsFullLOD flag
